6 C 6
7 AND 34n

Applying to 00111001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 C 0 = 1
1 C 1 = 1
2 C 2 = 1
3 C 3 = 1
4 C 4 = 1
5 C 5 = 1
6 C 6 = 1
7 AND 34n = NOT(AND 34) = NOT(AND(I 3,I 4)) = NOT(AND(1,1)) = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{11111110}
